$comment: schema_version=1.0.0 | Added 2026-06-03 | Scheduler Layer. Format for scheduler/runtime_status.json.
title: NOVA 2.5 Scheduler Runtime Status
description: Monitoring view of tasks that are currently active (IN_PROGRESS, REFACTOR_CLAIMED). Distinct from queue.json: this covers work already assigned, not work to be assigned. Used by the dashboard and lease health monitors.

monitored.description: One entry per active task (IN_PROGRESS or REFACTOR_CLAIMED). Ordered by lease health ascending (least healthy first) so critical tasks surface quickly.

assigned_agent.description: agent_id currently holding the implementation_lock. Null if no active lease found (indicates stale registry).

lease_health.description: 0.0-1.0. Computed as: max(0, 1 - heartbeat_age_seconds / ttl_seconds). 1.0 = perfectly fresh heartbeat. 0.0 = expired or no heartbeat.

heartbeat_age_seconds.description: Seconds since the last TASK_HEARTBEAT or LEASE_RENEWED event for this task's implementation_lock.

expires_in_seconds.description: Seconds until the active lease expires. Negative values indicate the lease has already expired but not been collected.

ttl_seconds.description: Lock TTL for this task's current role (21600 for IMPLEMENTATION, 7200 for REFACTOR).
